name: test_skipping_and_limiting_to_a_few_results_after_creating_relationships_does_not_affect_the_result_set_nor_the_side_effects

CREATE ()-[r:R {num: x}]->()
RETURN r.num AS num
SKIP 2 LIMIT 2
